E0/2D40 08          PHP
E0/2D41 85 B1       STA $B1
E0/2D43 0A          ASL A
E0/2D44 18          CLC
E0/2D45 65 B1       ADC $B1
E0/2D47 AA          TAX

E0/2D4C 85 B1       STA $B1
E0/2D4E E2 20       SEP #$20
E0/2D50 BF F2 13 E0 LDA $E013F2,x
E0/2D54 8D D5 19    STA $19D5
E0/2D57 28          PLP
E0/2D58 6B          RTL

E0/2D60 08          PHP
E0/2D61 E2 20       SEP #$20
E0/2D63 AD D5 19    LDA $19D5
E0/2D66 C9 C0       CMP #$C0
E0/2D68 F0 26       BEQ $2D90
E0/2D6A C9 CA       CMP #$CA
E0/2D6C F0 29       BEQ $2D97
E0/2D6E C9 E0       CMP #$E0
E0/2D70 F0 2C       BEQ $2D9E
E0/2D72 C9 E1       CMP #$E1
E0/2D74 F0 2F       BEQ $2DA5

E0/2D8F 6B          RTL

E0/2DA5 28          PLP
E0/2DA6 BF 00 00 E1 LDA $E10000,x
E0/2DAA 80 E3       BRA $2D8F

E0/2DE0 C2 20       REP #$20
E0/2DE2 DA          PHX

E0/2E40 D0 06       BNE $2E48

E0/2E85 68          PLA
